entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for disease incidence.

entities.name: SOWING DATE
entities.description: The date on which the crop is planted, used as a variable to observe its effect on disease.

entities.name: BOTRYTIS GRAY MOLD
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting the crop, measured by its incidence.

entities.name: BOTRYTIS CINEREA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing Botrytis Gray Mold.

entities.name: DHANUSH
entities.description: A specific genotype of chickpea showing lower infection levels.

entities.name: ICCV1
entities.description: A specific genotype of chickpea showing higher infection levels.

entities.name: ICCL82108
entities.description: A specific genotype of chickpea showing higher infection levels.

entities.name: INFECTION INTENSITY
entities.description: The degree or severity of the infection caused by the pathogen.

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: The genetic makeup of the chickpea varieties used in the study.

relationships.description: Sowing date affects the incidence of the disease
Botrytis cinerea is the causal agent of Botrytis Gray Mold
Dhanush is a variety of chickpea

Sowing date significantly influences the intensity of infection
